name: ocrmypdf
description: Performs Optical Character Recognition on PDF files using ocrmypdf, extracting text content and making PDFs searchable.

file_path_absolute.description: Absolute path to the PDF file to be processed.

ocr_confidence.description: OCR confidence score (0-100), or 0 if unavailable.

ocr_status.description: Processing status: success, failed, or skipped.

ocr_text_content.description: Extracted text content from the PDF.
